description: Main authentication gatekeeper that validates JWT tokens and user status before reaching protected endpoints.

success._developerHint: the request pass the middelware only when the token is valid, the user exists in the DB, and the user account is active. The user object is attached to the request.

errors._developerHint: Returned when the Authorization header is missing or empty.
Returned when the JWT signature is invalid or the token format is incorrect. Also returned if the user ID in the payload does not exist in the database.
Returned when the 'exp' claim in the JWT has passed.
Returned when the user record is found but the 'is_active' flag is false.
Returned when the database query fails due to connection issues or external service downtime.
A catch-all error for unexpected server-side exceptions during the validation process.
